name: Petroleum Planning & Analysis Cell
oneLine: DMARC absent + 6/6 hardening headers missing + permissive CSP

emailAuth.note: SPF includes mgovcloud.in with ~all soft-fail; DMARC entirely absent

findings: DMARC entirely absent — major spoofing surface for tender / pricing-circular impersonation

fingerprints.stack: CodeIgniter (ci_session cookie visible) + PHP, Sectigo DV TLS
versions: Sectigo Public Server Auth DV R36
eolFlags: CodeIgniter 3 EOL since 2022 (if running 3.x); CodeIgniter 4.x watch CVE-2025-54418

attackPaths.name: CodeIgniter version confirmation → unpatched RCE chain
attackPaths.entry: ci_session cookie confirms CodeIgniter framework. Version not exposed; if 3.x (EOL since 2022), multiple unpatched RCE routes via PHP object injection / file upload.
attackPaths.pivot: Craft serialised PHP object with gadget chain; trigger via form submission. /uploads directory enumeration.
attackPaths.objective: RCE, read DB credentials, exfiltrate data.ppac.gov.in contents.

attackPaths.name: Missing hardening headers → reflected XSS + clickjacking
attackPaths.entry: All 6 hardening headers missing on apex; CSP present but permissive (unsafe-inline).
attackPaths.pivot: Inject reflected XSS via query params; frame in iframe overlay for clickjacking.
attackPaths.objective: Harvest session cookies, redirect to phishing, persistent XSS via stored injection.

attackPaths.name: DMARC absence + soft-fail SPF → email spoofing for inter-ministry impersonation
attackPaths.entry: DMARC entirely absent; SPF soft-fail. Attacker sends from ppac@ppac.gov.in to MoPNG/PNGRB staff.
attackPaths.pivot: Phishing email with regulatory-traffic plausibility (PPAC is the canonical petroleum-data org).
attackPaths.objective: Credential harvest, lateral movement via inter-ministry trust.

paths.preAi: 5 hours (CodeIgniter vuln research + gadget chain + serialised payload + upload fuzzing)
paths.mythos: 1 hour (pre-cached CI3 RCE library, automated gadget generation)

paths.preAi: 3 hours (XSS payload + CSP-bypass research + clickjacking setup)

cisoPatchList.title: Confirm CodeIgniter version; if 3.x, plan migration to 4.6.2+
cisoPatchList.cve: CVE-2025-54418 if 4.x ImageMagick handler enabled; multiple unpatched if 3.x
cisoPatchList.fix: grep CI_VERSION in source. CI3 → migrate to CI 4.6.2+. Major version: audit all controllers/routes/models. Until migrated, deploy WAF rules blocking CI3 RCE patterns (unserialization, file inclusion).
cisoPatchList.validation: composer show codeigniter/framework | grep 4.6.2; unit tests pass

cisoPatchList.title: Deploy all 6 hardening headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
cisoPatchList.fix: Configure in Nginx/Apache or PHP header() calls. CSP: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'nonce-{random}'; object-src 'none'.
cisoPatchList.validation: securityheaders.com scan returns A or A+

cisoPatchList.title: Remove unsafe-inline from CSP; nonce-based execution
cisoPatchList.fix: Generate per-request nonce (32 bytes, base64). Update all inline <script> tags. Test with Report-Only header before enforcement.
cisoPatchList.validation: Page source shows nonces; injected scripts without nonce blocked

cisoPatchList.title: Publish DMARC p=reject; harden SPF
cisoPatchList.fix: DMARC: 'v=DMARC1; p=reject; rua=mailto:security@ppac.gov.in; fo=1'. SPF: explicit 'v=spf1 include:mgovcloud.in -all'.
cisoPatchList.validation: dig +short TXT _dmarc.ppac.gov.in returns p=reject; spoofed mail bounces

cisoPatchList.title: Audit file uploads; move upload directory outside web root
cisoPatchList.fix: Move /uploads outside web root. Disable script execution. Magic-byte file-type validation (not extension). ClamAV on upload.
cisoPatchList.validation: POST .php file returns 403; no script execution from upload dir

cisoPatchList.title: Replace string concatenation with parameterised queries
cisoPatchList.fix: Audit all DB queries. Use CI4 query builder or PDO prepared statements. SQLMap scan for residual injection points.

cisoPatchList.title: Rate-limit + CAPTCHA on login + data endpoints
cisoPatchList.fix: 5 login attempts per IP per 15 min; CAPTCHA after 2 failures; reCAPTCHA v3 on submit forms.
cisoPatchList.validation: 6th login attempt in 1 min returns 429 or CAPTCHA challenge

phase2.headlineQuestion: What CodeIgniter version is PPAC running today, and if it is 3.x (EOL since 2022), who owns the migration plan to a supported framework?
